name: Orthography

releases.author: denisoed
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fixed critical bugs and added new obsidian api methods by @denisoed in https://github.com/denisoed/obsidian-orthography/pull/21
* Updated manifest & version by @denisoed in https://github.com/denisoed/obsidian-orthography/pull/22
* Personal dictionary by @KarolinaMaczka in https://github.com/denisoed/obsidian-orthography/pull/24

## New Contributors
* @KarolinaMaczka made their first contribution in https://github.com/denisoed/obsidian-orthography/pull/24

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/denisoed/obsidian-orthography/compare/3.0.1...3.1.0

2. Fixed an error related to running the check when all files are closed
3. Moved text to constants

* Search for spelling errors in the text
* Displaying options for correcting word mistakes
* Correct a word mistake in one click
